items.name_cn:
Top-tier original factory, complete packaging
CD Lady 5-compartment Diana
Highest market version upgrade, definitely not market mass-produced goods, welcome to appreciate
Newest highest version, fine needle embroidery craftsmanship, top-tier embroidery fabric material usage. Eye-catching, embroidery LOGO added to the front, elegant🀄with a noble aura. Breaking conventional Diana, paired with the latest wide shoulder strap, can be handheld or crossbody. This is not just a bag, but a work of art.
Dimensions:24X20X11CM

items.name_cn:
❤️Mini Laser Gold
Original leather lining with sheepskin fleece D-Joy bag, 2023 model. Fashion is truly a cycle; returning to a vintage Diana, rectangular shape, short chain + slim shoulder strap is absolutely god-tier!! Strong retro chic, suitable for any occasion 😉 Definitely the ceiling of ladies' bags, making a strong splash sisters 👱‍♀️
Size; 16*5.5*10cm
